summary: The original representative #69108 is already closed. Current main at 6aa83374d90d35226b9cf3577155c3876a91b4b3 contains the session-id over agent fix and related tests, while the remaining --new-session feature is still tracked by open issue #54864 and needs maintainer product direction before an autonomous fix PR is appropriate. No close, merge, or fix PR action is planned for the closed cluster PRs.
